author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Mistfall Hunter - Release Date Trailer
Mistfall Hunter is a dark fantasy extraction ARPG set in Weavereach, a shattered world where the gods have perished and the Gyldenmist sweeps the realm. As a Gyldhunter, venture into the heart of the corruption solo or with up to two companions, defeating twisted creatures for their spoils or hunting rival Gyldhunters for their loot. Just be careful: if you die, you lose everything. To secure a safe return to the Windrest, Gyldhunters must track down extraction opportunities hidden within the realm and ring the bell known as Soul of Return to escape. However, the Gyldenmist may conceal more than one way out.

Heading to XBOX on July 29, 2026. Play the free Open Beta demo starting June 15.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/mistfall-hunter/9p8x6tvw9zw8

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Son of Thanjai - Gameplay Reveal Trailer
Step into the Chola dynasty. Son of Thanjai is an action-adventure game set in ancient South India, featuring the Surul Vaal, a flexible whip sword never before seen in gaming. Play as Vinnendiran, a fallen prince fighting to reclaim a throne through a land torn apart by invasion. Coming to XBOX Series X|S and PC.

Wishlist now: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/son-of-thanjai/9nt1xlll1pnn

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Palworld 1.0 Cinematic Trailer
Palworld 1.0 - July 10! Cinematic Trailer Reveal!

Pal Tamers, the time has finally come!

Since our Early Access launch in 2024, thanks to the incredible support of millions of players worldwide, Palworld is officially exiting Early Access and releasing Version 1.0 on July 10th!

We revealed our first-ever cinematic trailer. The footage reveals the long-awaited "World Tree" and hints at the epic scope of the new adventures waiting for you.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
FINAL FANTASY VII REVELATION - Reveal Trailer
As the world teeters on the brink of annihilation, the final battle against Sephiroth begins.

A meteor mars the sky, monstrous planetary guardians wreak havoc across the globe, and the fires of war rage. Now, Cloud and his companions must stand against this chaos to not only decide the planet's fate, but bring a legendary conflict to its conclusion.

In the final chapter of the FINAL FANTASY VII Remake Series, the scale has never been larger and the stakes have never been higher. Take to the skies and explore a boundless world, fight alongside a fully assembled party, master strategic and dynamic combat, and prepare yourself for the climactic finale.

A vast planet awaits. Everything leads here.

Release Date: Spring 2027

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Tour de France 2026 | Launch Trailer
Get ready to fight for the Yellow Jersey: Tour de France 2026 is available now!

Ride through sun, rain, mud and chaos in Tour de France 2026, where every stage can change in an instant. Experience new licensed races, revamped Team Time Trial gameplay, dynamic weather, and the official 2026 Tour route featuring iconic locations like the Sagrada Família and Montmartre.
Master slippery descents, brutal climbs and tactical peloton battles across 113 playable stages.

Play now on XBOX Series X|S

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/tour-de-france-2026/9n9f4k107h17

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Resident Evil Veronica - Announcement Trailer
Survive the Deranged Terror Resident Evil Veronica is a remake of 2000's Resident Evil Code: Veronica. This new title preserves the essence of the original game, while introducing modernized gameplay, a reimagined storyline, and vividly detailed graphics. In 2027, madness and intrigue, love and hate all combine to create a chilling new entry in survival horror.
Resident Evil Veronica reanimates in 2027 on XBOX Series X|S.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
STAR WARS: Galactic Racer™ - Official Story Trailer
Darius Pax may have founded the Galactic League, but Kestar Bool dominates it. As talented as he is villainous, Kestar uses his position as League Champion to threaten other pilots and extend his powerful reach even further. In a bid to retain control over his racing league, Darius Pax enlists the help of Shade, a mysterious pilot with a personal grudge against the Bool family. With the help of the energetic engineer Hibi and a certain legendary podracer, Shade's sights are set on unseating the corrupt reigning champion.  

Embark on a Star Wars™ adventure unlike any other and experience a rivalry that will define the course of the Galactic League in STAR WARS: Galactic Racer™

Launching worldwide on October 6th. Pre-order today for XBOX Series X|S.
https://www.xbox.com/games/store/star-wars-galactic-racer/9mxdpxsrvml5

text:
CONTROL Resonant - Paranatural Manhattan Trailer
The Oldest House has fallen. Reality is bent. Time is warping.

CONTROL Resonant features an open-ended, imaginative sandbox. Experience the largest and richest environment Remedy has ever constructed for a game in this new trailer, showing the visual diversity of paranaturally twisted Manahattan and its enemy factions.

CONTROL Resonant arrives September 24th 2026 to XBOX Series X|S and XBOX on PC. Pre-order now!
 
XBOX Series X|S: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9p092299fsgw

Developed and published by Remedy Entertainment.
